title: tui-translator SLO Specification (QA8-02)
description: Machine-readable Service Level Objective (SLO) contract consumed by the QA8-02b gate checker. Each gate declares a category, the metric path the checker must extract from soak/release evidence, a comparator, a threshold value, and a severity. A blocker gate failure must cause the checker to exit non-zero. This schema is the wave-1 deliverable for issue #500 (DOWNGRADED): schema only, no checker binary.

schema_version.description: Version of THIS JSON-Schema document. Bumped when the schema's structure changes.

spec_version.description: Semantic version of the SLO specification instance (the thresholds), e.g. 1.0.0.

generated_at.description: RFC3339 timestamp when this SLO spec was authored or last updated.

owners.description: GitHub handles that own this SLO spec.

notes.description: Free-form notes (review links, ADR refs, etc.).

gates.description: Ordered list of SLO gates. Order is informational; the checker must evaluate every gate.

category.description: The QA8-02 gate category. Must be one of the eight categories from issue #500: crash, frame, rss_slope, cpu, queue, audio, provider, virtual_mic.

comparator.description: How to compare the observed metric against the threshold.

severity.description: Failure severity. A 'blocker' failure must cause the checker to exit non-zero. 'warn' is informational.

gate.description: A single SLO gate the checker evaluates.

id.description: Stable, unique identifier for the gate (kebab-case).

metric.description: Dotted path the checker reads from evidence JSON to obtain the observed value, e.g. "audio.dropped_chunks" or "rss.slope_mb_per_hour".

threshold.description: The threshold value the observed metric is compared against. Accepts a number (integers are valid JSON Schema numbers under Draft-07), a boolean, or a non-empty string. A bare union of types is used instead of `oneOf` to avoid the Draft-07 ambiguity where an integer literal matches both `{type:number}` and `{type:integer}`, which would cause `oneOf` to reject integer thresholds.

description.description: Human-readable explanation of the gate and why it exists.

evidence_source.description: Optional hint to the checker about which evidence file produces this metric.

applies_to.description: Optional list of run profiles this gate applies to (e.g. "soak-1h", "soak-8h", "release"). If omitted, the gate applies to all profiles.
